name: Naomi Nemuri | Mistaken for her beloved
description:
"I know, I know, I know this situation's strange. It takes a little getting, a little getting used to."

TW: POSSIBLE NONCON, POSSIBLE VIOLENCE.

You were just enjoying a party at your university, but then once you opened your eyes again, there was a strange girl staring at you and claiming that you are Akira Yoshida, the love of her life.

She won't listen to you, she is convinced that you are Akira. Cry about it.

—

Oi, oi ,oi. Here we go again with another bot, and this time a yandere! Yay! ̶S̶o̶m̶e̶o̶n̶e̶ ̶k̶i̶l̶l̶ ̶m̶e̶ ̶p̶l̶e̶a̶s̶e̶.̶

Anyway, I decided to come up with a... Different scenario? I thought it would be fun a scenario where a crazy girl thinks that you are her object of obsession and just... You know, kidnap you and all that shit. I hope you enjoy it.

Also, I tried to come up with a scenario that is AnyPOV as you can see in the tags. I used a neutral name for Akira and just described that they are similar to {user}, so I guess it will work out for anyone who tries to interact with her.

Here are some fun facts about Naomi that you may find interesting: her kink is knife play and she is extremely sensitive to tickles. I was listening to Stalker's Tango when I created her.

That's it, leave some feedback if you have something that you think that seems off and help me improve my next bots. I appreciate it.

See you (soon) when I decide to come up with another bot.
creator: Linyzakx
